name: Salmon Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 can salmon (7.5 ounce), drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Place pie shells on a baking sheet. Pre-bake according to package directions.
2. Cool on a rack.
3. In a bowl, blend together sour cream, mayonnaise, flour, eggs, and milk.
4. Stir in salmon, mozzarella cheese, cheddar cheese, and onion.
5. Divide the mixture evenly between the pie shells.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 25 to 35 minutes.
